Dashboard Contribute API Docs

AtmosNet Documentation

Complete guide to understanding, using, and contributing to the world's most accurate hyperlocal weather network.

Quick Links:
API Reference Contribute Data Privacy Architecture

What is AtmosNet?

AtmosNet is a decentralized hyperlocal weather intelligence network that collects barometric pressure data from smartphones across Lagos, Nairobi, and Jakarta. Unlike traditional weather services that rely on sparse weather stations, AtmosNet creates dense, real-time weather maps using crowdsourced data from everyday devices.

How It Works

  1. Data Collection: Mobile apps collect barometric pressure readings (and optionally temperature/humidity) from device sensors.
  2. Privacy Protection: GPS coordinates are rounded to ~500m precision, device IDs are hashed with SHA-256. No personal data is stored.
  3. Validation: Each observation is validated against nearby readings using statistical outlier detection. Valid observations earn AtmosPoints.
  4. Aggregation: Validated data is aggregated into a grid-based weather model that updates in real-time.
  5. Distribution: API consumers access weather data via REST endpoints with free and paid tiers.

Architecture

Technology Stack

  • Backend: FastAPI (Python 3.11+) with async processing
  • Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL + PostGIS for geospatial queries)
  • Frontend: Static HTML/CSS/JS hosted on Netlify
  • Deployment: Render (backend) + Netlify (frontend)
  • Mobile: React Native + Expo

Data Flow

Mobile App → FastAPI → Database → Validation Engine → Grid Model → API Consumers

API Reference

See the API Documentation page for complete endpoint specifications, request/response formats, and code examples.

Base URL: https://atmosnet-backend.onrender.com

Contributing Data

Earn AtmosPoints by sharing weather data from your phone:

  1. Download the AtmosNet mobile app (iOS/Android) - coming soon
  2. Allow sensor and location permissions
  3. Data is automatically collected in the background (or manually submit)
  4. Each validated observation earns 10 points + bonuses
  5. Track your streak and compete on the leaderboard

Rewards Tiers

  • Basic: 10 points per valid observation
  • Tier A Bonus: +50 points for high-accuracy readings
  • Streak Bonus: +5 points per consecutive day (multiplies)
  • New Grid Cell: +25 points for first observation in a cell
  • Weekly Champion: +500 points bonus

Privacy & Security

We take privacy seriously. All data is anonymized before transmission:

  • Location: GPS coordinates rounded to ~500m precision
  • Device ID: Hashed with SHA-256 (unrecoverable)
  • Data Collected: Only barometric pressure, timestamp, and approximate location
  • Personal Data: No names, emails, or phone numbers stored
  • Transmission: HTTPS encrypted, no data sold to third parties
  • Controls: Users can opt-out anytime, delete their data, or use manual mode

For Developers

Integration

Integrate AtmosNet weather data into your application:

  • Sign up for an API key (Free: 1,000 calls/day)
  • Make HTTP requests to the endpoints
  • Parse JSON responses and display in your app
  • Cache responses to stay within rate limits
Important: The mobile app is not yet available. Data contribution features will be enabled after the app launch. In the meantime, you can test the API using the endpoints.

Launch Plan

AtmosNet is rolling out in phases:

Phase Target Status
Lagos Launch5,000 sensors✅ In Progress
Nairobi Launch7,000 sensors⏳ Planned
Jakarta Launch5,000 sensors⏳ Planned
ExpansionAccra, Dar es Salaam⏳ Future
